title: Package with the most extreme honest framing
principle: Click-through is driven by intrigue and extremity. The more extreme the framing — as long as the video pays it off — the higher the CTR.
rule: Prefer high-intrigue verbs and superlatives ('I Survived' over 'I Spent'; 'Bananas Are The Worst Food On Earth' over 'I Don't Like Bananas'). The claim MUST be delivered in the video, or the packaging is blocked.

source.name: MrBeast — 'How to Succeed in MrBeast Production' internal memo (2024 leak)
